item.title: OC comic reposts- help me pay for my dogs vet bills
item.description:
In case anyone’s confused about why I was such an odd kid…. ✨ AUTISM ✨
I have been a long time imgurian comic artist who shares her stories. I posted the last two days about my dog needing help and so many of you rallied around us and generated funds and upvotes for exposure. He had to have two separate emergency surgeries totaling $12,000. We don’t even know if he will make it. The vets had us optimistic which is why we proceeded to save his life, but we got an update it’s about 50/50 now as he just got of his second surgery. we have about 10k of the 12k vet bills covered, we are almost to the full amount. If you have ever laughed, smiled or enjoyed my comics I beg of you to help upvote this for the fund awareness. Please and thank you from the bottom of my heart. —————- Original post details: We need help. On May 11th, at 11:30 pm, our beloved German Shepherd, Atreyu, had his stomach flip; Gastric Dilatation Volvulus (GDV). This is an emergency and life-threatening situation in which a dog with this condition has on average two hours to live. That night, while feeding my foster kitten, I checked on Atreyu, who had seemed slightly off the hour before. His abdomen had swelled up to three or four times the size it should be. I knew instantly his stomach had flipped and he was nearing death. Freddie was able to speed to the Veterinary ER Hospital and get there in just enough time for them to perform the first life-saving surgery. Unfortunately though he needed another surgery (yesterday) and it didn’t go the way they planned. He has about 50/50 chance of making it. We have a small amount in our savings but we are not able to afford the full amount. Any help from our friends and family or even fans of the comics, to help pay towards these two emergency surgeries would be desperately and greatly appreciated. I know we are not the only ones tight on money in this economy so please know, no matter what amount you can pay/or upvote this post, if you are able to help us we are forever thankful for anything you can do. http://spot.fund/vnr8hsc https://www.paypal.me/KristieLaneK
item.dc:creator: ristay

item.title: Out VS In Catwoman Cosplay
item.description: SnarkyJayCosplay here— wanted to share this fun comparison. I just rescued both of these kittens (Ivy on the left, Bruce on the right) about a week ago and I’m smitten. So here’s the “cat lady” playing with kittens, and Catwoman from one of my favorite photoshoots with my good friend Jerry Kestel.

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1216 (bronouns)
item.description:
Yeah, you heard me. I'm walking my fish. It's morning. Time to scream existentially at the sky and get this bread.
Just finished Fallout last night and hot damn, what a ride. Loved it.
What if I say it about thirty times and vary its declension?
I'll take either, honestly.
Especially silicate geologists.
Ouroboros can have some ouroboros, as a treat.
My Norse garb is 99 percent the dude on the right, but just with a different hat and different colors. I ORDERED MY SCYTHIAN CLOTHES I'm stupid excited.
I'd really enjoy this. She's guard captain, I'm in the front lines.
This is probably lore for the CK3 mod "After the End"
This Boi be gracklin' hard.
Hahahahahah, his is that ouroboros we talked about earlier.
This one is so good I'm reposting it as my first image for tomorrow.
Awww. Sad. Seems like the video didn't load.
Awwww. @QuidditchQueen713
Wait. Here we go?
Pippin tax. Today's message from Pippin: "Reeeeeerreewwe. Go Fuck you." (I accidentally hit a pinfeather when givng him scritches and now he is MAD.)
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Wholesome post to brighten your day 1282
item.description:
https://imgur.com/gallery/pPh0ZVM Wholesome Post 1281 https://imgur.com/gallery/j1xXdu2 Wholesome Post 1280 https://imgur.com/gallery/Ol4qWiL Wholesome Post 1279 https://imgur.com/gallery/MoQc2UR Wholesome Post 1278 https://imgur.com/gallery/u7gkSNN Wholesome Post 1277 https://imgur.com/gallery/PUAlS14 Wholesome Post 1276 https://imgur.com/gallery/N6scbuS Wholesome Post 1275
I include a fundraiser link in all of my posts to help raise money for people in need. I hope we can help https://www.modestneeds.org/features/ledger/viewapp.asp?source=BrowseRequest&mode=upd&rp=l&id=632152
I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support, would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/8M983spH48
I hope this post brightened your day :) and i hope it is a lovely day for you! If you need to talk I am always available on discord (username HaveAGreatDay) and happy to listen. You matter, and if you are struggling please reach out for help. I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support, would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/8M983spH48

item.title: It Is Wednesday
item.description:
To all who count the days
or already lost it
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: Every morning and night I send my two adult sons, their SOs, and my wife a batch of memes as a love note. Dad jokes, words of affirmation, funnies, oddball humor, and jams. Here’s the latest batch randomly ordered. Enjoy.
item.description:
Be silly today.
Behave, dipshits.
This is what I sent them after one of them admitted he had our group chat on mute (so it didn’t chime during class).
Dad advice. Be aware of all four indicators, whether you are doing them or you are witnessing others doing them.
I love you. Hang in there.
Dad advice.
Morning jams! Make this the best day of your week.
Learn to be direct when the situation calls for it. Learn to be ok with others being direct with you. It’ll help. I promise.
Words of affirmation.
Be warm.
Be silly today.
It’s Wednesday. Here’s your morning jam.
Muhuhahahaha!
Be wary of the chickens today.
Drink your milk.
Sweet dreams. Good night.
Word of the day.
I’m done with today, too. Good night.
Take the chance anyway.
Today’s jam.
CHAAAAARRRRGGGEEE!! Attack the day.
Son #1 has a thing against glitter. He also has a beard. We tease him.
Have a good day today.
Hold on to your weird friends.
Good morning, monsters. I love you.
Have a rad day.
Be good to those you love today.
Don’t bring that shit in here. Psychos. Good night. Sweet dreams.
Aaaaaaaaaaa!!! Hahahahahaha!
It has LAYERS!
Dad joke! Hoo haha.
Your friends and work colleagues love me.
Not to be ableist, but how is a snake going to stride?
This is you two cooking for mom on Mother’s Day. Lol. Make sure to watch not just listen.
Be good to yourself today.
SHARKS WITH LEGS! Sweet dreams. Good night.
Makes you wonder why they don’t stop by and ring the doorbell. Maybe it’s because the blinds are open?
Wanna get matching tattoos?
Eek!
You’re doing great. I’m proud of you.
S-N-A-C-K-S?
This is every text of you two to each other. Dipshits.
Speed!
Good night. I sleepy.
Sneef zee foot.
I love you.
It’s DORA!
item.dc:creator: Wheretheheckisjason

item.title: Do you think Clark Kent's first few major articles were about the continued presence of lead pipes in parts of Metropolis' water system?
item.dc:creator: pilomotor

item.title: just void screams
item.description: I usually see one or two panels of this comic, but never really the whole thing together - I've never known the source but I look at it every so often. I've been dealing with a lot of pressure from some family to be around who's been verbally and emotionally abusive and I refuse to to fold. With Mental Health thing going on, figured I'd scream into the void out of frustration. It's hard being an adult and seeing your parents flaws and their unwillingness to admit they're wrong or that they've been actively doing something to hurt you to make their own life easier.
item.dc:creator: cadetcypress

item.title: Started taking post-secondary courses at 10, earns a doctorate at 17

Imagine getting ket from your employer.
He's here to tell you to go to Healthcare.Gov!
Remember when Trump told people to inject bleach for Covid? Yeah it could've been worse.
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
One of my viewers is a bit sus. http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii Elvis lives, dies, and lives again.
Furry Porn Artists have done some amazing work and do not use their positions to strip anyone of rights and freedoms.
E S C A P E
He was too a thirsty little boy.
Cunty Lorax is fucking amazing.
Mood
f r o g
Worm for President
What the fuck Kodak.
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay For STREEEEEEM: http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Have some memes while I wait on some news
item.description:
So back in December of 2022, I was part of the first wave of audio workers who was laid off
It hurt, and it taught me that no matter how good you are, you are a number, and business is the bottom line, so take care of yourself
Anyways, I'm sure I'm not the only person in the US who's noticed, but the job market sucks
My industry itself mostly collapsed overnight and the jobs became scarce at best
I spent my whole time working squirreling away money with the intent of buying an apartment in Mexico (where I'm originally from)
Anyways, that money is the money I survived on. I'm a millennial, silly me, I forgot we're not meant to own property.
But yeah, I currently teach part-time at a place, but this only covers my rent, and that's it. I don't even like this job
So I've been searching for almost 2 years, and I finally started interviewing at a place
I did 3 rounds, including the final one where I spoke to the whole team in person. I think they liked me.
And so they said they would tell me early this week.
And still nothing. No news.
I am not an anxious person, but this is messing with me. This job would change a lot for me. Like I know I have a 1 in 4 chance of getting it, but I feel like I might get it
But regardless, the suspense is killing me
I need this job, and I hope I get it. I also don't know how it will hit me if I don't.
Anyways, here's some memes. Wish me luck!
I think luck is the last thing I've had since I got laid off.
Take care of yourselves at work. Don't overdo it. These people will not hesitate to dump you, it's not worth it, even if you like what you do, and are good at it. That audio production job was great, and little did I know that I was a frop in a pot.
UPDATE: So I did hear back. Now it's between me and one other candidate. They asked for references, which I promptly emailed over. And now we wait, again.
item.dc:creator: QueTeValga

item.title: Your Cat Loves You Alot....
item.description: Aww.... Thank you Imgurian for the accolade! Did you know that possums are the only marsupials north of Mexico? Yup! Please have an awesome evening!✨ Nope nope nope! I must defer to you Imgurian! Thank you for the accolade, but we all know you are the best! Did you know that possums can't choose to play dead? It's a sudden, natural response to fear. Sorta like those fainting goats. Huh....✨
item.dc:creator: HorrorMango

item.title: Last night a grizzly saved my life.... On the dance floor
item.description: I would legit get a hotdog tattoo after this, maybe a hotdog guardian angel with a lil halo and wings lol
